query:
-- ユーザー数と課金状態
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_users,
  SUM(CASE WHEN subscription_status = 'trial' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as trial_users,
  SUM(CASE WHEN subscription_status = 'active' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as active_users,
  SUM(CASE WHEN subscription_status = 'free' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as free_users,
  SUM(CASE WHEN subscription_status IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as null_users
FROM users;

-- 冷蔵庫データを持つユーザー数
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) as users_with_fridge FROM fridge_items;

-- 家族構成データを持つユーザー数
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) as users_with_family FROM family_members;

-- 献立データを持つユーザー数
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) as users_with_menu FROM menu_plans;
